name: Feature-wise Double Descent (research)
description: Independent ML study (draft paper): 13,000+ training runs showing the interpolation peak is a spectral phenomenon, predictable without training a single model.

name: Mejengas App
description: Real-time Flutter application for live session management, letting players join via unique codes with real-time synchronization and automatic team balancing.

name: Geopolitical Risk Analytics
description: Interactive dashboard that explores geopolitical risk indicators and their relationship with economic instability across countries.

name: Market Price Analytics (deferia.cr)
description: Data platform on CNP agricultural price data (UCR x FAO): historical trends, seasonal patterns and regional differences across fairs.

name: ECCI QR Access Control
description: QR-based electronic access-control system that replaced manual sign-in with a secure, traceable digital process for an academic assistance program.

name: Museo del Espacio Matemático
description: 30+ interactive math & physics visualizations (orbits, Fibonacci, fields) controllable by webcam hand-tracking, packaged as an installable PWA.
